steps.title: Read the emotional context
steps.content: The motorman is chafing in his box and thinking about the difficult lot of laboring people. The sentence says he registered discontent, so the word must fit making that inner dissatisfaction visible or evident.

steps.title: Choose the fitting meaning
steps.content: Choice A means enrolled, which does not fit an emotion. Choice B means valued, but the passage does not say he prized discontent. Choice C means disregarded, the opposite of showing it. The physical scene points to an outward expression of dissatisfaction, so displayed best fits registered in context. The answer is D.
